  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    ChooseColorController
    The controller of the scene where you have to choose the color
    ChooseConnectionController
    The controller of the scene where you have to put the server's IP and choose the type of connection
    ChooseObjectiveController
    The controller of the scene where the objective card is chosen
    ChooseStarterController
    The controller of the scene where the starter card is chosen
    CreateGameController
    The controller of the scene where a new game is created
    GameBoardController
    Controller to manage the game GUI.
    GUIController
    Abstract base class for GUI controllers.
    GUIView
    GUI representation of the client-side view.
    LobbyGUIController
    The controller of the scene where you have to choose between creating a new game or joining an old one
    WaitingController
    The controller of the scene where players wait for the game to start
